summary: Workflow actions not pinned to SHA (violates requirement; lines 20, 21). No test files provided despite TDD requirement. check-project job uses `|| true` (line 57) suppressing exit code, defeating license-check failure detection. Missing sample-package.json, sample-config.json, and project package.json referenced in workflow. No actionlint/act validation shown. Code structure and types are sound, but delivery incomplete and several explicit requirements unfulfilled.
